hook: The more selective you become, the less random dating starts to feel.
body: Intentional filtering turns dating from a slot machine into a slower but more coherent decision process.

hook: A lot of men swipe broadly, then complain that the resulting conversations feel thin or chaotic.
body: Broader is not always better. A narrower funnel can create stronger momentum when the inputs are cleaner.
